name: vault-sync
description: Cross-platform vault sync infrastructure for Codex: rclone push, GitHub fetch-notify, presync, snapshot, and Linux FUSE freshness refresh.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-platform vault sync infrastructure for Codex agents
interface.longDescription: 6 skills (vault-sync-install, vault-sync-status, vault-sync-uninstall, vault-presync, vault-snapshot, vault-fuse-freshness) for managing rclone push, git fetch-notify, presync lint/rebase, snapshot promotion, and Linux FUSE freshness refresh across macOS and Linux hosts.
defaultPrompt: Install vault-sync on this host with leaf role.
Run a FUSE freshness audit and refresh if needed.
Run presync lint gate and rebase before pushing.
